chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI High Court Appeal Nos. 64, 65 & 66 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1.For order on office objection a/w reply at A 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of CMA No.1437/2017 22.12.2025 ---------- Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate files powers on behalf of appellants, same are taken on record. These appeals have been pending since 2017 and despite interim orders having been sought, the appellants remained unrepresented since obtaining such orders. On the last date, the appellants remained unrepresented and in the interest of justice, a fix date was given. Today, learned counsel for the appellants merely seeks time and despite repeated requests, is unable to proceed with these matters. In view of the foregoing, the appeals are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to place a copy of this order in the connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
